# VB-CABLE (bundled virtual audio driver)

This folder holds the official **VB-Audio VB-CABLE** Windows driver package
downloaded by `npm run fetch:vbcable` / prebuild.

- Origin: https://www.vb-cable.com / https://vb-audio.com/Cable/
- License: donationware — end users may donate if they find it useful
- BoysChanger may redistribute the package under VB-Audio’s distribution terms
  when the product is clearly attributed and users can still donate

Do not replace this with VB-CABLE A+B or C+D (those may not be redistributed).

Generated files (`*.exe`, `*.zip`) are gitignored; CI / pack scripts fetch them.
